---
title: "PR 2. Postman Screenshots"
subtitle: "Software Architecture"
author: Alejandro Perez Bueno
date: today
date-format: "MMM DD, YYYY"
toc: true
toc-title: "Table of Contents"
linkcolor: blue
documentclass: report
format:
  pdf:
    linestretch: 1.25
    geometry:
      - top=30mm
      - left=20mm
      - heightrounded
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
          \pagestyle{fancy}
          \fancyhead[C]{UOC}
          \fancyhead[R]{aperez-b@uoc.edu}
          \fancyfoot{}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
---

{{< pagebreak >}}

# Exercise 2: Operation Evidence

## Course Service

### C1. Find All Courses

![](img/C01_find_all_courses.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C2. Find Courses by Title

![](img/C02_find_courses_by_title.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C3. Find Courses by Instructor

![](img/C03_find_courses_by_instructor.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C4. Get Course by ID

![](img/C04_get_course_by_id.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C5. Create Course

![](img/C05_create_course.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C6. Modify Course Details

![](img/C06_modify_course_details.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C7. Open Enrollment

![](img/C07_open_enrollment.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C8. Enroll in Course

![](img/C08_enroll_in_course.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C9. Get Enrolled Students

![](img/C09_get_enrolled_students.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C10. Close Enrollment

![](img/C10_close_enrollment.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C11. Close Course

![](img/C11_close_course.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### C12. Close Grade Reports

![](img/C12_close_grade_reports.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Microcredential Service

### M1. Request Microcredential for Enrollment 3

![](img/M01_request_microcredential_enrollment3.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M2. Request Microcredential for Enrollment 4

![](img/M02_request_microcredential_enrollment4.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M3. Get Pending Microcredentials

![](img/M03_get_pending_microcredentials.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M4. Get Microcredential by ID

![](img/M04_get_microcredential_by_id.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M5. Approve Microcredential

![](img/M05_approve_microcredential.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M6. Reject Microcredential

![](img/M06_reject_microcredential.png)

{{< pagebreak >}}

### M7. Request Course Microcredentials

![](img/M07_request_course_microcredentials.png)
